title: "Modelling"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-10"
---

```{r}
# Libraries
library(rminer)
```

```{r}
# Get Data
baltimore_uni <- readRDS("data_clean/baltimore_uni.rds")
baltimore_multi <- readRDS("data_clean/baltimore_multi.rds")

lancaster_uni <- readRDS("data_clean/lancaster_uni.rds")
lancaster_multi <- readRDS("data_clean/lancaster_multi.rds")

philadelphia_uni <- readRDS("data_clean/philadelphia_uni.rds")
philadelphia_multi <- readRDS("data_clean/philadelphia_multi.rds")

richmond_uni <- readRDS("data_clean/richmond_uni.rds")
richmond_multi <- readRDS("data_clean/richmond_multi.rds")
```


```{r}

# ── Parâmetros globais ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
NPRED <- 7
LAGS  <- c(1, 2, 7)
RUNS  <- 20    # número fixo de iterações
STEP  <- 7     # cada iteração avança 1 semana
K     <- 7     # sazonalidade semanal

# ── Pesos para comparação de modelos (NMAE + RMSE) ─────────────────────────
W_NMAE <- 0.5
W_RMSE <- 0.5

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# FUNÇÃO DE PÓS-PROCESSAMENTO
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
postprocess_predictions <- function(predictions, dates_futuros=NULL) {

  # 1. Arredondar para inteiro — não pode haver clientes decimais
  predictions <- round(predictions)

  # 2. Garantir não negativos
  predictions <- pmax(predictions, 0L)

  # 3. Aplicar regras de dias fechados se datas fornecidas
  if (!is.null(dates_futuros)) {
    datas_str <- format(as.Date(dates_futuros), "%m-%d")

    # Dias onde a loja está sempre fechada (0 clientes)
    dias_fechados <- c(
      "12-25",  # Natal
      "12-31",  # Véspera de Ano Novo
      "01-01"   # Ano Novo
    )

    fechado_idx <- datas_str %in% dias_fechados
    if (any(fechado_idx)) {
      cat("  [Pós-processamento] Dias forçados a 0:",
          format(as.Date(dates_futuros)[fechado_idx], "%Y-%m-%d"), "\n")
      predictions[fechado_idx] <- 0L
    }
  }

  return(as.integer(predictions))
}

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# FUNÇÃO DE SCORING PONDERADO (NMAE + RMSE)
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
weighted_score <- function(med_nmae, med_rmse,
                           all_nmae, all_rmse,
                           w_nmae=W_NMAE, w_rmse=W_RMSE) {
  # Normaliza as medianas pelo range de todos os modelos
  # Score mais baixo = modelo melhor
  range_nmae <- diff(range(all_nmae))
  range_rmse <- diff(range(all_rmse))

  norm_nmae <- if (range_nmae > 0) (med_nmae - min(all_nmae)) / range_nmae else 0
  norm_rmse <- if (range_rmse > 0) (med_rmse - min(all_rmse)) / range_rmse else 0

  return(w_nmae * norm_nmae + w_rmse * norm_rmse)
}
```


```{r}
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# FASE I — UNIVARIADO
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
forecast_univariate_phaseI <- function(serie, loja_nome, lags=LAGS, npred=NPRED) {

  S      <- serie
  srange <- as.numeric(diff(quantile(S, probs=c(0.01, 0.99))))
  D      <- CasesSeries(S, lags)
  N      <- nrow(D)
  TR     <- 1:(N - npred)
  TS     <- (N - npred + 1):N

  cat("\n======", loja_nome, "(Univariado Fase I) ======\n")
  cat("Total exemplos D:", N, "| Treino:", length(TR), "| Teste:", length(TS), "\n")

  NN  <- fit(y~., D[TR,], model="mlpe",        search="heuristic")
  RF  <- fit(y~., D[TR,], model="randomForest", search="heuristic")

  START <- N - npred + 1
  PNN   <- postprocess_predictions(lforecast(NN, D, start=START, horizon=npred))
  PRF   <- postprocess_predictions(lforecast(RF, D, start=START, horizon=npred))
  PSN   <- as.integer(round(S[(length(S) - npred*2 + 1):(length(S) - npred)]))

  Y <- D[TS,]$y

  metrics_fn <- function(label, Pred) {
    cat(label,
        "| NMAE:", round(mmetric(Y, Pred, metric="NMAE", val=srange), 2), "%",
        "| RMSE:", round(mmetric(Y, Pred, metric="RMSE"), 2), "\n")
  }

  metrics_fn("NN ", PNN)
  metrics_fn("RF ", PRF)
  metrics_fn("SN ", PSN)

  # Scoring ponderado
  modelos   <- c("NN","RF","SN")
  nmae_vals <- c(mmetric(Y,PNN,metric="NMAE",val=srange),
                 mmetric(Y,PRF,metric="NMAE",val=srange),
                 mmetric(Y,PSN,metric="NMAE",val=srange))
  rmse_vals <- c(mmetric(Y,PNN,metric="RMSE"),
                 mmetric(Y,PRF,metric="RMSE"),
                 mmetric(Y,PSN,metric="RMSE"))

  scores <- mapply(weighted_score,
                   nmae_vals, rmse_vals,
                   MoreArgs=list(all_nmae=nmae_vals, all_rmse=rmse_vals))
  names(scores) <- modelos
  cat("Score ponderado (menor=melhor):", paste(modelos, round(scores,3), sep="=", collapse=" | "), "\n")
  cat("Melhor modelo Fase I:", modelos[which.min(scores)], "\n")

  mgraph(Y, PNN, graph="REG",
         main=paste0(loja_nome, " NN (NMAE=",
                     round(mmetric(Y,PNN,metric="NMAE",val=srange),1), "%)"),
         Grid=10, col=c("black","blue"), lty=1,
         leg=list(pos="topright", leg=c("real","NN pred.")))

  return(list(Y=Y, PNN=PNN, PRF=PRF, PSN=PSN, srange=srange))
}

res_balt <- forecast_univariate_phaseI(baltimore_uni$Num_Customers,    "Baltimore")
res_lanc <- forecast_univariate_phaseI(lancaster_uni$Num_Customers,    "Lancaster")
res_phil <- forecast_univariate_phaseI(philadelphia_uni$Num_Customers, "Philadelphia")
res_rich <- forecast_univariate_phaseI(richmond_uni$Num_Customers,     "Richmond")
```


```{r}

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# FASE II — UNIVARIADO — Growing Window com RUNS fixo
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
backtesting_univariate <- function(serie, loja_nome, lags=LAGS,
                                   npred=NPRED, runs=RUNS, step=STEP) {
  S      <- serie
  srange <- as.numeric(diff(quantile(S, probs=c(0.01, 0.99))))
  D      <- CasesSeries(S, lags)
  L      <- nrow(D)

  # W calculado a partir do número fixo de iterações
  W <- L - npred - (runs - 1) * step
  if (W < 30) stop("Janela de treino demasiado pequena. Reduz RUNS.")

  cat("Loja:", loja_nome, "| nrow(D):", L,
      "| W:", W, "dias | runs:", runs, "\n")

  ev_nn_nmae <- numeric(runs); ev_nn_rmse <- numeric(runs)
  ev_rf_nmae <- numeric(runs); ev_rf_rmse <- numeric(runs)
  ev_sn_nmae <- numeric(runs); ev_sn_rmse <- numeric(runs)
  all_Y <- c(); all_PNN <- c(); all_PRF <- c()

  for (b in 1:runs) {

    H2   <- holdout(D$y, ratio=npred, mode="incremental",
                    iter=b, window=W, increment=step)
    M_nn <- fit(y~., D[H2$tr,], model="mlpe",         search="heuristic")
    M_rf <- fit(y~., D[H2$tr,], model="randomForest",  search="heuristic")

    P_nn <- postprocess_predictions(lforecast(M_nn, D, start=(length(H2$tr)+1), horizon=npred))
    P_rf <- postprocess_predictions(lforecast(M_rf, D, start=(length(H2$tr)+1), horizon=npred))

    inicio_teste_S <- H2$ts[1] + max(lags)
    P_sn <- as.integer(round(S[(inicio_teste_S - npred):(inicio_teste_S - 1)]))

    Y_real <- D[H2$ts,]$y

    ev_nn_nmae[b] <- mmetric(Y_real, P_nn, metric="NMAE", val=srange)
    ev_nn_rmse[b] <- mmetric(Y_real, P_nn, metric="RMSE")
    ev_rf_nmae[b] <- mmetric(Y_real, P_rf, metric="NMAE", val=srange)
    ev_rf_rmse[b] <- mmetric(Y_real, P_rf, metric="RMSE")
    ev_sn_nmae[b] <- mmetric(Y_real, P_sn, metric="NMAE", val=srange)
    ev_sn_rmse[b] <- mmetric(Y_real, P_sn, metric="RMSE")

    cat("Iter:", b,
        "| NN NMAE:", round(ev_nn_nmae[b],1), "RMSE:", round(ev_nn_rmse[b],1),
        "| RF NMAE:", round(ev_rf_nmae[b],1), "RMSE:", round(ev_rf_rmse[b],1),
        "| SN NMAE:", round(ev_sn_nmae[b],1), "RMSE:", round(ev_sn_rmse[b],1), "\n")

    all_Y   <- c(all_Y,   Y_real)
    all_PNN <- c(all_PNN, P_nn)
    all_PRF <- c(all_PRF, P_rf)
  }

  # Medianas
  med_nn_nmae <- median(ev_nn_nmae); med_nn_rmse <- median(ev_nn_rmse)
  med_rf_nmae <- median(ev_rf_nmae); med_rf_rmse <- median(ev_rf_rmse)
  med_sn_nmae <- median(ev_sn_nmae); med_sn_rmse <- median(ev_sn_rmse)

  cat("\n---", loja_nome, "---\n")
  cat("NN  | mediana NMAE:", round(med_nn_nmae,2), "% | mediana RMSE:", round(med_nn_rmse,2), "\n")
  cat("RF  | mediana NMAE:", round(med_rf_nmae,2), "% | mediana RMSE:", round(med_rf_rmse,2), "\n")
  cat("SN  | mediana NMAE:", round(med_sn_nmae,2), "% | mediana RMSE:", round(med_sn_rmse,2), "\n")

  # Scoring ponderado
  all_nmae <- c(med_nn_nmae, med_rf_nmae, med_sn_nmae)
  all_rmse <- c(med_nn_rmse, med_rf_rmse, med_sn_rmse)
  scores   <- c(
    NN = weighted_score(med_nn_nmae, med_nn_rmse, all_nmae, all_rmse),
    RF = weighted_score(med_rf_nmae, med_rf_rmse, all_nmae, all_rmse),
    SN = weighted_score(med_sn_nmae, med_sn_rmse, all_nmae, all_rmse)
  )
  melhor <- names(which.min(scores))
  cat("Score ponderado (menor=melhor):",
      paste(names(scores), round(scores,3), sep="=", collapse=" | "), "\n")
  cat("Melhor modelo:", melhor, "\n")
  cat("Melhoria vs SN:",
      round((med_sn_nmae - min(med_nn_nmae, med_rf_nmae)) / med_sn_nmae * 100, 1), "%\n")

  # Gráfico agregado
  plot(all_Y, type="l", col="black",
       main=paste0(loja_nome, " — Growing Window (", runs, " iterações)"),
       ylab="Num_Customers", xlab="Observações de teste acumuladas")
  lines(all_PNN, col="blue", lty=2)
  lines(all_PRF, col="red",  lty=3)
  legend("topright", c("Real","NN","RF"),
         col=c("black","blue","red"), lty=c(1,2,3))

  return(list(
    ev_nn_nmae=ev_nn_nmae, ev_nn_rmse=ev_nn_rmse,
    ev_rf_nmae=ev_rf_nmae, ev_rf_rmse=ev_rf_rmse,
    ev_sn_nmae=ev_sn_nmae, ev_sn_rmse=ev_sn_rmse,
    scores=scores, melhor=melhor
  ))
}

```

```{r}
bt_balt <- backtesting_univariate(baltimore_uni$Num_Customers,    "Baltimore")
bt_lanc <- backtesting_univariate(lancaster_uni$Num_Customers,    "Lancaster")
bt_phil <- backtesting_univariate(philadelphia_uni$Num_Customers, "Philadelphia")
bt_rich <- backtesting_univariate(richmond_uni$Num_Customers,     "Richmond")
```

```{r}
# ── Tabela resumo univariado ────────────────────────────────────────────────
resultados <- data.frame(
  Loja        = c("Baltimore","Lancaster","Philadelphia","Richmond"),
  NN_NMAE     = c(median(bt_balt$ev_nn_nmae), median(bt_lanc$ev_nn_nmae),
                  median(bt_phil$ev_nn_nmae), median(bt_rich$ev_nn_nmae)),
  NN_RMSE     = c(median(bt_balt$ev_nn_rmse), median(bt_lanc$ev_nn_rmse),
                  median(bt_phil$ev_nn_rmse), median(bt_rich$ev_nn_rmse)),
  RF_NMAE     = c(median(bt_balt$ev_rf_nmae), median(bt_lanc$ev_rf_nmae),
                  median(bt_phil$ev_rf_nmae), median(bt_rich$ev_rf_nmae)),
  RF_RMSE     = c(median(bt_balt$ev_rf_rmse), median(bt_lanc$ev_rf_rmse),
                  median(bt_phil$ev_rf_rmse), median(bt_rich$ev_rf_rmse)),
  SN_NMAE     = c(median(bt_balt$ev_sn_nmae), median(bt_lanc$ev_sn_nmae),
                  median(bt_phil$ev_sn_nmae), median(bt_rich$ev_sn_nmae)),
  SN_RMSE     = c(median(bt_balt$ev_sn_rmse), median(bt_lanc$ev_sn_rmse),
                  median(bt_phil$ev_sn_rmse), median(bt_rich$ev_sn_rmse)),
  Melhor      = c(bt_balt$melhor, bt_lanc$melhor, bt_phil$melhor, bt_rich$melhor)
)
resultados$Melhoria_pct <- round(
  (resultados$SN_NMAE - pmin(resultados$NN_NMAE, resultados$RF_NMAE)) /
   resultados$SN_NMAE * 100, 1)
print(resultados)
```


```{r}
# ── Gráfico NMAE + RMSE por iteração ───────────────────────────────────────
plot_metricas <- function(bt_result, loja_nome) {
  runs  <- length(bt_result$ev_nn_nmae)
  iters <- 1:runs

  par(mfrow=c(1,2))

  # NMAE
  ylim_nmae <- range(c(bt_result$ev_nn_nmae, bt_result$ev_rf_nmae, bt_result$ev_sn_nmae))
  plot(iters, bt_result$ev_nn_nmae, type="b", col="blue", pch=19, lty=1,
       ylim=ylim_nmae, main=paste0(loja_nome, " — NMAE por iteração"),
       xlab="Iteração", ylab="NMAE (%)")
  lines(iters, bt_result$ev_rf_nmae, type="b", col="red",   pch=17, lty=2)
  lines(iters, bt_result$ev_sn_nmae, type="b", col="black", pch=15, lty=3)
  abline(h=median(bt_result$ev_nn_nmae), col="blue",  lty=2, lwd=1.5)
  abline(h=median(bt_result$ev_rf_nmae), col="red",   lty=2, lwd=1.5)
  abline(h=median(bt_result$ev_sn_nmae), col="black", lty=2, lwd=1.5)
  legend("topright",
         c(paste0("NN (med=",  round(median(bt_result$ev_nn_nmae),1), "%)"),
           paste0("RF (med=",  round(median(bt_result$ev_rf_nmae),1), "%)"),
           paste0("SN (med=",  round(median(bt_result$ev_sn_nmae),1), "%)")),
         col=c("blue","red","black"), lty=c(1,2,3), pch=c(19,17,15))

  # RMSE
  ylim_rmse <- range(c(bt_result$ev_nn_rmse, bt_result$ev_rf_rmse, bt_result$ev_sn_rmse))
  plot(iters, bt_result$ev_nn_rmse, type="b", col="blue", pch=19, lty=1,
       ylim=ylim_rmse, main=paste0(loja_nome, " — RMSE por iteração"),
       xlab="Iteração", ylab="RMSE")
  lines(iters, bt_result$ev_rf_rmse, type="b", col="red",   pch=17, lty=2)
  lines(iters, bt_result$ev_sn_rmse, type="b", col="black", pch=15, lty=3)
  abline(h=median(bt_result$ev_nn_rmse), col="blue",  lty=2, lwd=1.5)
  abline(h=median(bt_result$ev_rf_rmse), col="red",   lty=2, lwd=1.5)
  abline(h=median(bt_result$ev_sn_rmse), col="black", lty=2, lwd=1.5)
  legend("topright",
         c(paste0("NN (med=",  round(median(bt_result$ev_nn_rmse),1), ")"),
           paste0("RF (med=",  round(median(bt_result$ev_rf_rmse),1), ")"),
           paste0("SN (med=",  round(median(bt_result$ev_sn_rmse),1), ")")),
         col=c("blue","red","black"), lty=c(1,2,3), pch=c(19,17,15))

  par(mfrow=c(1,1))
}

plot_metricas(bt_balt,  "Baltimore")
plot_metricas(bt_lanc,  "Lancaster")
plot_metricas(bt_phil,  "Philadelphia")
plot_metricas(bt_rich,  "Richmond")
```


```{r}
# ── Previsão final univariada (com pós-processamento) ──────────────────────
previsao_final <- function(serie, loja_nome, lags=LAGS, npred=NPRED,
                           datas_futuras=NULL, melhor_modelo="NN") {
  S <- serie
  D <- CasesSeries(S, lags)

  modelo_final <- fit(y~., D, model=ifelse(melhor_modelo=="RF","randomForest","mlpe"),
                      search="heuristic")

  START   <- nrow(D) + 1
  P_raw   <- lforecast(modelo_final, D, start=START, horizon=npred)
  P_final <- postprocess_predictions(P_raw, datas_futuras)

  cat("\n===", loja_nome, "— Previsão próximos 7 dias ===\n")
  for (i in 1:npred) {
    data_str <- if (!is.null(datas_futuras)) paste0(" (", format(as.Date(datas_futuras)[i], "%Y-%m-%d"), ")") else ""
    cat("Dia +", i, data_str, ":", P_final[i], "clientes\n")
  }

  ultimos <- tail(S, 28)
  plot(1:28, ultimos, type="l", col="black",
       xlim=c(1, 28+npred),
       main=paste0(loja_nome, " — Últimas 4 semanas + Previsão"),
       ylab="Num_Customers", xlab="Dias")
  lines((28+1):(28+npred), P_final, type="b", col="blue", pch=19)
  legend("topleft", c("Real","Previsão"), col=c("black","blue"), lty=1)

  return(P_final)
}

datas_futuras <- seq(as.Date("2014-06-15"), by="day", length.out=7)

prev_balt <- previsao_final(baltimore_uni$Num_Customers, "Baltimore",
                             datas_futuras=datas_futuras,
                             melhor_modelo=bt_balt$melhor)
prev_lanc <- previsao_final(lancaster_uni$Num_Customers, "Lancaster",
                             datas_futuras=datas_futuras,
                             melhor_modelo=bt_lanc$melhor)
prev_phil <- previsao_final(philadelphia_uni$Num_Customers, "Philadelphia",
                             datas_futuras=datas_futuras,
                             melhor_modelo=bt_phil$melhor)
prev_rich <- previsao_final(richmond_uni$Num_Customers, "Richmond",
                             datas_futuras=datas_futuras,
                             melhor_modelo=bt_rich$melhor)
```

```{r}
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# FORECAST MULTIVARIADO
# Variáveis endógenas: Num_Customers + Sales_Lag1
# Método MLPE
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

library(vars)
library(forecast)
library(rminer)

# ── Funções do multi-utils.R embutidas ──────────────────────────────────────

conv_ts <- function(x, frequency=1, labels=NULL) {
  if (is.vector(x)) {
    x <- ts(as.matrix(cbind(x)), frequency=frequency)
    if (is.null(labels)) labels <- "x_1"
  } else if (is.data.frame(x) || is.matrix(x)) {
    if (is.null(labels) && !is.null(names(x))) labels <- names(x) else labels <- paste("x_", 1:ncol(x), sep="")
    if (is.data.frame(x)) x <- as.matrix(x)
    x <- ts(x, frequency=frequency)
  }
  attr(x, "dimnames")[[2]] <- labels
  return(x)
}

vreverse <- function(x) x[length(x):1]

mfit <- function(mtr, model, VINP, exogen=NULL) {
  nmodels <- ncol(mtr)
  lagmax  <- 1
  for (i in 1:nmodels)
    for (j in 1:nmodels)
      lagmax <- max(lagmax, VINP[[i]][[j]])
  mdata <- vector("list", length=nmodels)
  for (i in 1:nmodels) mdata[[i]] <- CasesSeries(mtr[,i], 1:lagmax)
  if (!is.null(exogen)) {
    NR <- nrow(mtr)
    if (is.vector(exogen)) {
      if (NR == length(exogen)) exogen <- cbind(exogen[(lagmax+1):NR])
      else exogen <- cbind(exogen)
    } else if (NR == nrow(exogen)) exogen <- exogen[(lagmax+1):NR,]
    exogen <- as.data.frame(exogen)
  }
  mdata2 <- vector("list", length=nmodels)
  for (i in 1:nmodels) {
    for (j in 1:nmodels) {
      if (j == 1) {
        mnames <- names(mdata[[j]])
        inames <- paste("lag", VINP[[i]][[j]], sep="")
        I <- NULL
        for (k in inames) I <- c(I, which(mnames==k))
        I  <- sort(I)
        D  <- mdata[[j]][,I]
        if (is.vector(D)) D <- data.frame(cbind(D))
        NCD    <- ncol(D)
        dnames <- vreverse(inames)
        ini <- 1; end <- ini + length(dnames) - 1
        names(D)[ini:end] <- paste("x", j, dnames, sep="")
      } else {
        NCD    <- ncol(D)
        inames <- paste("lag", VINP[[i]][[j]], sep="")
        dnames <- vreverse(inames)
        D      <- cbind(D, mdata[[j]][,dnames])
        ini    <- NCD + 1; end <- ini + length(dnames) - 1
        names(D)[ini:end] <- paste("x", j, dnames, sep="")
      }
    }
    if (!is.null(exogen)) D <- cbind(D, exogen, y=mdata[[i]]$y)
    else D <- cbind(D, y=mdata[[i]]$y)
    mdata2[[i]] <- D
  }
  mmodels <- vector("list", length=nmodels)
  for (i in 1:nmodels) mmodels[[i]] <- fit(y~., mdata2[[i]], model=model)
  return(list(mdata=mdata2, mmodels=mmodels, vinp=VINP))
}

lforecastm <- function(model, h=10, exogen=NULL) {
  models <- length(model$mmodels)
  res    <- vector("list", length=models)
  for (j in 1:models) res[[j]] <- vector(length=h)
  if (!is.null(exogen) && is.vector(exogen)) exogen <- cbind(exogen)
  exogen <- as.data.frame(exogen)
  if (!is.null(exogen)) nexo <- names(exogen)
  VEX    <- vector("list", length=models)
  vnames <- vector("list", length=models)
  VI     <- vector("list", length=models)
  for (i in 1:h) {
    for (j in 1:models) {
      start    <- nrow(model$mdata[[j]]) - h + 1
      VEX[[j]] <- model$mdata[[j]][start+i-1,]
      if (i > 1) {
        for (k in 1:models) {
          VI[[k]]     <- intersect(1:(i-1), model$vinp[[j]][[k]])
          vnames[[k]] <- paste("x", k, "lag", VI[[k]], sep="")
          vnames[[k]] <- vreverse(vnames[[k]])
          VI[[k]]     <- as.numeric(VI[[k]])
          VEX[[j]][,vnames[[k]]] <- res[[k]][(i-1) - vreverse(VI[[k]]) + 1]
        }
      }
      if (!is.null(exogen)) { INP <- VEX[[j]]; INP[,nexo] <- exogen[i,] }
      else INP <- VEX[[j]]
      res[[j]][i] <- predict(model$mmodels[[j]], INP)
    }
  }
  return(res)
}
```

```{r}
# ── Parâmetros ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
NPRED     <- 7
W_SEMANAS <- 25
K         <- 7   # sazonalidade semanal

# VINP: lags para cada variável endógena
# Var 1 (Num_Customers): lags 1,2,7 de Num_Customers + lags 1,7 de Sales
# Var 2 (Sales):         lags 1,7 de Num_Customers   + lags 1,2,7 de Sales
VINP        <- vector("list", length=2)
VINP[[1]]   <- list(c(1,2,7), c(1,7))
VINP[[2]]   <- list(c(1,7),   c(1,2,7))

# ── Função auxiliar de gráfico e métricas para 2 variáveis ─────────────────
fshow_multi <- function(Y, Pred1, Pred2, method, loja_nome) {
  par(mfrow=c(1,2))
  srange1 <- as.numeric(diff(quantile(Y[,1], probs=c(0.01,0.99))))
  srange2 <- as.numeric(diff(quantile(Y[,2], probs=c(0.01,0.99))))
  nmae1   <- round(mmetric(Y[,1], Pred1, metric="NMAE", val=srange1), 1)
  nmae2   <- round(mmetric(Y[,2], Pred2, metric="NMAE", val=srange2), 1)
  mgraph(Y[,1], Pred1, graph="REG", Grid=10,
         main=paste0(loja_nome, " ", method, " Num_Customers (NMAE=", nmae1, "%)"),
         col=c("black","blue"), leg=list(pos="topleft", leg=c("real",method)))
  mgraph(Y[,2], Pred2, graph="REG", Grid=10,
         main=paste0(loja_nome, " ", method, " Sales (NMAE=", nmae2, "%)"),
         col=c("black","red"),  leg=list(pos="topleft", leg=c("real",method)))
  par(mfrow=c(1,1))
  cat(method, loja_nome,
      "| Num_Customers NMAE:", nmae1, "%",
      "| Sales NMAE:", nmae2, "%\n")
}

# ── Preparar matriz endógena a partir do dataframe multi ───────────────────
prepare_endogenous <- function(df_multi) {
  # Endógenas: Num_Customers e Sales_Lag1 (proxy de Sales sem data leakage)
  mtr_end <- cbind(
    Num_Customers = df_multi$Num_Customers,
    Sales         = df_multi$Sales_Lag1
  )
  # Remover linhas com NA (primeiros registos por causa dos lags)
  mtr_end <- mtr_end[complete.cases(mtr_end), ]
  return(mtr_end)
}

# ── Preparar variáveis exógenas ─────────────────────────────────────────────
prepare_exogenous <- function(df_multi, n_rows) {
  exo_cols <- intersect(colnames(df_multi),
                        c("TouristEvent_num","IsHoliday",
                          "IsBlackFriday","IsChristmas","Pct_On_Sale"))
  if (length(exo_cols) == 0) return(NULL)
  exogen <- as.matrix(df_multi[1:n_rows, exo_cols])
  return(exogen)
}
```


```{r}
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# FASE I — MULTIVARIADO
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
forecast_multi_phaseI <- function(df_multi, loja_nome, npred=NPRED) {
  mtr_end <- prepare_endogenous(df_multi)
  N       <- nrow(mtr_end)
  exogen  <- prepare_exogenous(df_multi, N)
  hd      <- holdout(mtr_end[,1], ratio=npred, mode="order")
  Y       <- mtr_end[hd$ts,]
  exotr   <- if (!is.null(exogen)) exogen[hd$tr,,drop=FALSE] else NULL
  exots   <- if (!is.null(exogen)) exogen[hd$ts,,drop=FALSE] else NULL

  cat("\n======", loja_nome, "(Multivariado Fase I) ======\n")
  cat("N:", N, "| Treino:", length(hd$tr), "| Teste:", npred, "\n")

  MNN  <- mfit(mtr_end[hd$tr,], "mlpe", VINP, exogen=exotr)
  Pred <- lforecastm(MNN, h=npred, exogen=exots)

  # Pós-processamento apenas em Num_Customers
  Pred[[1]] <- postprocess_predictions(Pred[[1]])

  fshow_multi(Y, Pred[[1]], Pred[[2]], "MLPE", loja_nome)
  return(list(Y=Y, MLPE=Pred))
}

res_multi_balt <- forecast_multi_phaseI(baltimore_multi,    "Baltimore")
res_multi_lanc <- forecast_multi_phaseI(lancaster_multi,    "Lancaster")
res_multi_phil <- forecast_multi_phaseI(philadelphia_multi, "Philadelphia")
res_multi_rich <- forecast_multi_phaseI(richmond_multi,     "Richmond")

```

```{r}
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# FASE II — MULTIVARIADO — Growing Window com RUNS fixo
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
backtesting_multi <- function(df_multi, loja_nome,
                              npred=NPRED, runs=RUNS, step=STEP) {

  mtr_end  <- prepare_endogenous(df_multi)
  N        <- nrow(mtr_end)
  exogen   <- prepare_exogenous(df_multi, N)
  srange_c <- as.numeric(diff(quantile(mtr_end[,1], probs=c(0.01,0.99))))

  # W calculado a partir do número fixo de iterações
  W <- N - npred - (runs - 1) * step
  if (W < 30) stop("Janela de treino demasiado pequena. Reduz RUNS.")

  cat("Loja:", loja_nome, "| N:", N,
      "| W:", W, "dias | runs:", runs, "\n")

  ev_mlpe_nmae <- numeric(runs); ev_mlpe_rmse <- numeric(runs)
  ev_sn_nmae   <- numeric(runs); ev_sn_rmse   <- numeric(runs)
  all_Y <- c(); all_MLPE <- c()

  for (b in 1:runs) {

    H2 <- holdout(mtr_end[,1], ratio=npred, mode="incremental",
                  iter=b, window=W, increment=step)

    Y_real <- mtr_end[H2$ts, 1]
    exotr  <- if (!is.null(exogen)) exogen[H2$tr,,drop=FALSE] else NULL
    exots  <- if (!is.null(exogen)) exogen[H2$ts,,drop=FALSE] else NULL

    MNN    <- mfit(mtr_end[H2$tr,], "mlpe", VINP, exogen=exotr)
    Pred   <- lforecastm(MNN, h=npred, exogen=exots)
    P_mlpe <- postprocess_predictions(Pred[[1]])

    P_sn <- as.integer(round(mtr_end[(H2$ts[1] - npred):(H2$ts[1] - 1), 1]))

    ev_mlpe_nmae[b] <- mmetric(Y_real, P_mlpe, metric="NMAE", val=srange_c)
    ev_mlpe_rmse[b] <- mmetric(Y_real, P_mlpe, metric="RMSE")
    ev_sn_nmae[b]   <- mmetric(Y_real, P_sn,   metric="NMAE", val=srange_c)
    ev_sn_rmse[b]   <- mmetric(Y_real, P_sn,   metric="RMSE")

    cat("Iter:", b,
        "| MLPE NMAE:", round(ev_mlpe_nmae[b],1), "RMSE:", round(ev_mlpe_rmse[b],1),
        "| SN NMAE:",   round(ev_sn_nmae[b],1),   "RMSE:", round(ev_sn_rmse[b],1), "\n")

    all_Y    <- c(all_Y,    Y_real)
    all_MLPE <- c(all_MLPE, P_mlpe)
  }

  med_mlpe_nmae <- median(ev_mlpe_nmae); med_mlpe_rmse <- median(ev_mlpe_rmse)
  med_sn_nmae   <- median(ev_sn_nmae);   med_sn_rmse   <- median(ev_sn_rmse)

  cat("\n---", loja_nome, "(Multivariado) ---\n")
  cat("MLPE | mediana NMAE:", round(med_mlpe_nmae,2), "% | mediana RMSE:", round(med_mlpe_rmse,2), "\n")
  cat("SN   | mediana NMAE:", round(med_sn_nmae,2),   "% | mediana RMSE:", round(med_sn_rmse,2),   "\n")

  all_nmae <- c(med_mlpe_nmae, med_sn_nmae)
  all_rmse <- c(med_mlpe_rmse, med_sn_rmse)
  scores   <- c(
    MLPE = weighted_score(med_mlpe_nmae, med_mlpe_rmse, all_nmae, all_rmse),
    SN   = weighted_score(med_sn_nmae,   med_sn_rmse,   all_nmae, all_rmse)
  )
  melhor <- names(which.min(scores))
  cat("Score ponderado:", paste(names(scores), round(scores,3), sep="=", collapse=" | "), "\n")
  cat("Melhor modelo:", melhor, "\n")
  cat("Melhoria vs SN:",
      round((med_sn_nmae - med_mlpe_nmae) / med_sn_nmae * 100, 1), "%\n")

  plot(all_Y, type="l", col="black",
       main=paste0(loja_nome, " Multi MLPE — Growing Window (", runs, " iterações)"),
       ylab="Num_Customers", xlab="Observações de teste acumuladas")
  lines(all_MLPE, col="red", lty=2)
  legend("topright", c("Real","MLPE"), col=c("black","red"), lty=c(1,2))

  return(list(
    ev_mlpe_nmae=ev_mlpe_nmae, ev_mlpe_rmse=ev_mlpe_rmse,
    ev_sn_nmae=ev_sn_nmae,     ev_sn_rmse=ev_sn_rmse,
    scores=scores, melhor=melhor
  ))
}

bt_multi_balt <- backtesting_multi(baltimore_multi,    "Baltimore")
bt_multi_lanc <- backtesting_multi(lancaster_multi,    "Lancaster")
bt_multi_phil <- backtesting_multi(philadelphia_multi, "Philadelphia")
bt_multi_rich <- backtesting_multi(richmond_multi,     "Richmond")
```


```{r}
# ── Gráfico NMAE + RMSE por iteração — Multivariado ────────────────────────
plot_metricas_multi <- function(bt_result, loja_nome) {
  runs  <- length(bt_result$ev_mlpe_nmae)
  iters <- 1:runs

  par(mfrow=c(1,2))

  # NMAE
  ylim_nmae <- range(c(bt_result$ev_mlpe_nmae, bt_result$ev_sn_nmae))
  plot(iters, bt_result$ev_mlpe_nmae, type="b", col="red", pch=19, lty=1,
       ylim=ylim_nmae, main=paste0(loja_nome, " Multi — NMAE por iteração"),
       xlab="Iteração", ylab="NMAE (%)")
  lines(iters, bt_result$ev_sn_nmae, type="b", col="black", pch=15, lty=2)
  abline(h=median(bt_result$ev_mlpe_nmae), col="red",   lty=2, lwd=1.5)
  abline(h=median(bt_result$ev_sn_nmae),   col="black", lty=2, lwd=1.5)
  legend("topright",
         c(paste0("MLPE (med=", round(median(bt_result$ev_mlpe_nmae),1), "%)"),
           paste0("SN (med=",   round(median(bt_result$ev_sn_nmae),1),   "%)")),
         col=c("red","black"), lty=c(1,2), pch=c(19,15))

  # RMSE
  ylim_rmse <- range(c(bt_result$ev_mlpe_rmse, bt_result$ev_sn_rmse))
  plot(iters, bt_result$ev_mlpe_rmse, type="b", col="red", pch=19, lty=1,
       ylim=ylim_rmse, main=paste0(loja_nome, " Multi — RMSE por iteração"),
       xlab="Iteração", ylab="RMSE")
  lines(iters, bt_result$ev_sn_rmse, type="b", col="black", pch=15, lty=2)
  abline(h=median(bt_result$ev_mlpe_rmse), col="red",   lty=2, lwd=1.5)
  abline(h=median(bt_result$ev_sn_rmse),   col="black", lty=2, lwd=1.5)
  legend("topright",
         c(paste0("MLPE (med=", round(median(bt_result$ev_mlpe_rmse),1), ")"),
           paste0("SN (med=",   round(median(bt_result$ev_sn_rmse),1),   ")")),
         col=c("red","black"), lty=c(1,2), pch=c(19,15))

  par(mfrow=c(1,1))
}

plot_metricas_multi(bt_multi_balt,  "Baltimore")
plot_metricas_multi(bt_multi_lanc,  "Lancaster")
plot_metricas_multi(bt_multi_phil,  "Philadelphia")
plot_metricas_multi(bt_multi_rich,  "Richmond")
```

```{r}
# ── Tabela resumo multivariado ──────────────────────────────────────────────
resultados_multi <- data.frame(
  Loja       = c("Baltimore","Lancaster","Philadelphia","Richmond"),
  MLPE_NMAE  = c(median(bt_multi_balt$ev_mlpe_nmae), median(bt_multi_lanc$ev_mlpe_nmae),
                 median(bt_multi_phil$ev_mlpe_nmae), median(bt_multi_rich$ev_mlpe_nmae)),
  MLPE_RMSE  = c(median(bt_multi_balt$ev_mlpe_rmse), median(bt_multi_lanc$ev_mlpe_rmse),
                 median(bt_multi_phil$ev_mlpe_rmse), median(bt_multi_rich$ev_mlpe_rmse)),
  SN_NMAE    = c(median(bt_multi_balt$ev_sn_nmae),   median(bt_multi_lanc$ev_sn_nmae),
                 median(bt_multi_phil$ev_sn_nmae),   median(bt_multi_rich$ev_sn_nmae)),
  SN_RMSE    = c(median(bt_multi_balt$ev_sn_rmse),   median(bt_multi_lanc$ev_sn_rmse),
                 median(bt_multi_phil$ev_sn_rmse),   median(bt_multi_rich$ev_sn_rmse)),
  Melhor     = c(bt_multi_balt$melhor, bt_multi_lanc$melhor,
                 bt_multi_phil$melhor, bt_multi_rich$melhor)
)
resultados_multi$Melhoria_pct <- round(
  (resultados_multi$SN_NMAE - resultados_multi$MLPE_NMAE) /
   resultados_multi$SN_NMAE * 100, 1)

print(resultados_multi)
```
